## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between Ataccama and GrowthX for improving Ataccama's GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) and LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content strategy, creation, and optimization for improved GEO and LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Ataccama seeks to improve their ranking in LLMs (GPT, Gemini, Copilot) against competitors like Informatica and Collibra](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach includes AI-driven content creation with human oversight, focusing on editorial content (e.g., blogs) to build domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [A team demo is scheduled for October 8th to dive deeper into GrowthX's offerings and potential partnership](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

## Topics

### Ataccama's Current GEO Challenges

  - [Experiencing a drop in SEO traffic due to changes in Google's passage retrieval (now using Gemini AI summary)](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Competitors (Informatica, Collibra) dominating in LLM space](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Ataccama not prominently featured in ChatGPT responses](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Seeking agency support to measure and improve stack ranking against competitors in LLMs (GPT, Gemini, Copilot)](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Offerings

  - [End-to-end agency partner for SEO, GEO strategy, and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content (e.g., blogs) to build domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [AI-driven content creation process with multiple models and human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [Fact-checking and deep research agents ensure accuracy and quality](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Capability to create programmatic content at scale (e.g., thousands of pages for specific use cases)](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Provides visibility and analytics for LLM performance](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Strategy sprint to understand audience, product, and company](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Creation of personas and artifacts to inform content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Robust brief generation considering keywords, traffic, SERP factors, and competitor content](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Deep research and fact-checking processes to ensure accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Ability to stage and publish content directly in client's CMS](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)

### LLM Visibility and Analytics

  - [GrowthX provides visibility and analytics for LLM performance](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Currently partnered with Scrunch, but building analytics into their platform](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [Tracks performance in ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity (possibly Claude)](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)
  - [Clients can set up and track custom prompts](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)

### Success Stories and ROI

  - [Augment Code: 10x increase in organic traffic, improved AI Citations](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Tiro: Quick ROI with improved domain authority and blog performance](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Exec: 46x growth in LLM referral traffic (16 to 741 sessions)](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [AI search visits are 4.4 times more likely to convert than traditional search visits](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to prepare more formal case studies and success stories for the upcoming meeting](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [George to coordinate with Ataccama team members (VP of Product Marketing, VP of Demand Gen, Head of Web) for the demo](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Scheduled team demo with GrowthX on October 8th at 9 AM Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more detailed information on LLM ranking improvements and success metrics](https://fathom.video/share/EnqaPPg_6oQNgAq2yzUVmuFm1JYxy1qx?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
